message:
feat(ftui-text): fix bidi cursor movement, rope range ops, and wrap quality

Bidi: replace manual modulo checks with is_multiple_of() for readability.
Remove unnecessary return keywords in match arms. Fix move_right RTL test
expectation from 1 to 2 to match correct visual-to-logical cursor mapping
when moving right from the RTL end position.

Rope: rewrite remove_range() to compute start/end bounds directly from
the RangeBounds trait instead of using normalize_range(), which could
silently clamp out-of-bounds indices. Add guard to skip rope.remove()
when char_start >= char_end to avoid panics on empty or inverted ranges.
Rewrite grapheme_to_char_idx() to use a single linear scan instead of
per-line counting with separate offset calculation, fixing off-by-one
errors at line boundaries where the old approach could double-count
line-slice characters.

Wrap: increase KP_MAX_LOOKAHEAD from 64 to 1024 to improve Knuth-Plass
optimal line-breaking quality for paragraphs with many short words,
at acceptable cost since the DP pruning still bounds worst-case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
